title: Man killed in alleged housebreaking incident
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 39-year-old man from Dam-se-Bos South has been killed during an alleged housebreaking incident, with two suspects now facing multiple serious charges.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 39-year-old man from Dam-se-Bos South has been killed during an alleged housebreaking incident, with two suspects now facing multiple serious charges."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies confirmed the incident, stating that it occurred in the early hours of Friday 2 January. Knysna Police were called to a residence in Sonqayi Street, Dam-se-Bos, at approximately 04:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police officers found the victim with a stab wound to the head. Emergency medical services were summoned, but the man was declared dead on the scene.","html":"Police officers found the victim with a stab wound to the head. Emergency medical services were summoned, but the man was declared dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A police investigation was immediately launched, leading to the arrest of two suspects, both aged 24. The suspects have been charged with murder, housebreaking with intent to commit a crime unknown to the State, and assault with intent to do grievous bodily harm.","html":"A police investigation was immediately launched, leading to the arrest of two suspects, both aged 24. The suspects have been charged with murder, housebreaking with intent to commit a crime unknown to the State, and assault with intent to do grievous bodily harm."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The accused made their first appearance in the Knysna Magistrate's Court on Monday 5 January, where they were remanded in custody."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter was postponed to Monday 12 January to allow for bail information and legal representation.","html":"The matter was postponed to Monday 12 January to allow for bail information and legal representation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During their second court appearance, the two suspects were once again remanded in custody. A formal bail application hearing has been scheduled for 20 January.","html":"During their second court appearance, the two suspects were once again remanded in custody. A formal bail application hearing has been scheduled for 20 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man killed in alleged housebreaking incident
